ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the composition */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the composition */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the composition */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the composition */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the composition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the composition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the composition */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the composition is publicly accessible */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description or notes about the composition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "composition_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composition the feature belongs to */,
  "onset" REAL /* Onset of the feature */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the feature */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the feature */,
  "division" INTEGER /* Division of the feature */,
  "bar" INTEGER /* Bar of the feature */,
  "beat" INTEGER /* Beat of the feature */,
  "tatum" INTEGER /* Tatum of the feature */,
  "beat_duration" REAL /* Beat duration of the feature */,
  "signature" TEXT /* Signature of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., melody, harmony) */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument associated with the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_composition_features_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES compositions ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitches" (
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the pitch belongs to */,
  "pitch_value" REAL /* Value of the pitch */,
  "octave" INTEGER /* Octave of the pitch */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the pitch within the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES composition_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loudness" (
  "loudness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loudness measure */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the loudness measure belongs to */,
  "loud_max" REAL /* Maximum loudness value */,
  "loud_median" REAL /* Median loudness value */,
  "loud_min" REAL /* Minimum loudness value */,
  "loud_average" REAL /* Average loudness value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loudness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loudness_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES composition_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phrases" (
  "phrase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phrase */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composition the phrase belongs to */,
  "phrase_begin" INTEGER /* Beginning of the phrase */,
  "phrase_end" INTEGER /* End of the phrase */,
  "phrase_type" TEXT /* Type of phrase (e.g., intro, verse) */,
  "chorus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chorus the phrase belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phrase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phrases_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES compositions ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "choruses" (
  "chorus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chorus */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composition the chorus belongs to */,
  "chorus_begin" INTEGER /* Beginning of the chorus */,
  "chorus_end" INTEGER /* End of the chorus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chorus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choruses_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES compositions ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chords" (
  "chord_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chord */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the chord belongs to */,
  "chord_value" TEXT /* Value of the chord */,
  "chord_duration" REAL /* Duration of the chord within the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chord_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chords_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES composition_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composition the form belongs to */,
  "form_value" TEXT /* Value of the form */,
  "form_description" TEXT /* Description of the form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forms_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES compositions ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ideas" (
  "idea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each idea */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composition the idea belongs to */,
  "idea_value" TEXT /* Value of the idea */,
  "idea_description" TEXT /* Description of the idea */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ideas_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES compositions ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "composition_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composition being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the composition */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the composition was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_composition_access_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES compositions ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_composition_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
